case_title: KEWIE XU VS. GIOVANNI MARIO CINCOTTA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,975.40 FILED BY XU, KEWIE AS TO DEFENDANT CINCOTTA, GIOVANNI MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ATION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT CINCOTTA, GIOVANNI MARIO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, KEWIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, KEWIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CINCOTTA, GIOVANNI MARIO $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.00, DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT THAT OCCURRED WHEN HE REVERSED QUICKLY AGAINST TRAFFIC ACROSS HARRIET ST. ON FOLSOM. DAMAGES ARE BASED ON THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR PLUS PERSONAL PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED AUG-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CINCOTTA, GIOVANNI MARIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KEWI XU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER JOANNE LIU. DEFENDANT GIOVANNI CINCOTTA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-15-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF KEWIE XU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GIOVANNI CINCOTTA IS PRESENT. MANDARIN INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
